title: excoecaria agallocha var. ovalis
intro: Excoecaria agallocha var. ovalis, a lesser-known variant of the more commonly recognized Excoecaria agallocha, is a plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects. The health benefits associated with Excoecaria agallocha var. ovalis include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in traditional medicines, often in the form of extracts or infusions, which are used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions.
